message.content:
To multiply \(17\) by \(23\) we can break the numbers into parts that are easier to multiply, then add the partial products.

\[
\begin{aligned}
17 \times 23 &= 17 \times (20 + 3) \\
&= 17 \times 20 \;+\; 17 \times 3 \\
&= (17 \times 2 \times 10) \;+\; (17 \times 3) \\
&= 34 \times 10 \;+\; 51 \\
&= 340 \;+\; 51 \\
&= 391.
\end{aligned}
\]

So,
message.name: MiniMax AI
